dict.string: LocalClicky controls apps like Spotify on your Mac only when you explicitly ask it to (for example, "play music on Spotify"). This stays on your Mac.
LocalClicky uses your microphone so you can talk to it. Audio is transcribed on-device and never leaves your Mac.
LocalClicky captures a screenshot only when you press the hot key, so the local vision model can see your screen and point at things. The screenshot never leaves your Mac.
LocalClicky uses on-device speech recognition to transcribe your voice. Nothing is sent to any server.
